name: Rube Works: The Official Rube Goldberg Invention Game
developer: Electric Eggplant, Kalani Games, Inc., HRG (Heirs of Rube Goldberg), Unity Games
short_description: The first and only official Rube Goldberg puzzle game. Solve everyday problems in Rube’s trademark elaborate style by creating complex and hilarious machines.Is pouring a glass of juice just too straightforward and boring? Try using a jack-in-the-box, magnifying glass, string and a cymbal-wielding friend to achieve your goal.
